subcodes.first_line: A letter was presented before the Throne and thy name was inscribed therein; wherefore this Tablet hath been sent down in reply [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابی لدی العرش حاضر و اسم تو در آن مذکور لذا این لوح در جواب آن مسطور و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
